allowed_actions: run local typecheck, tests, baseline, and wrangler dry-runs
provision preview resources after placeholder ids are replaced
blocked_actions: route uploads to R2 before object-count and checksum validation
delete or mutate Cloud SQL, GCS, Redis, RabbitMQ, or GKE resources
required_before_cutover: full /api/instances/ parity with current nested IInstanceInfo shape
distinct legacy upstream host for proxy fallback
authenticated smoke covering login, sidebar, project list, work item CRUD, uploads, and live update
Better Stack monitors green for GKE and Cloudflare preview
